title: Projectiles, Edge Triggers, Cooldowns, Lifetimes, and Reuse · Runtime Lens: Pool Reset
summary: Held fire spawns unbounded bullets, cooldown uses frame count, expired bullets remain in collision groups, pool reuse keeps old velocity, and rapid restart leaks projectiles. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pool reset increment in bounded projectile lifecycle. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice…
objectives: If reuse is justified, reset all position, velocity, age, owner, collision, render, and active fields and prove reconciliation.
Expire projectiles by world distance or simulation time and remove every group and collision reference exactly once.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

Build deterministic Python evidence to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. A defensible solution applies Pool Reset, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to bounded projectile lifecycle.

content.code:
# Worked focus: asteroids-pool-reset — If reuse is justified, reset all position, velocity, age, owner, collision, render, and active fields and prove reconciliation.
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-projectiles-cooldowns-pools-2
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-projectiles-cooldowns-pools-2.
# Case 7417: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state.
def worked_asteroids_projectiles_cooldowns_pools_2(requested_shots: int = 12, accepted_shots: int = 5, cooldown_ms: int = 180, lifetime_ms: int = 900, live_cap: int = 6, leaked_projectiles: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "playerworked2",
        "seed7417",
        "input2dekrow",
        "frameworked27417",
        "state7417worked2",
        "playtest2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if requested_shots < 0 or accepted_shots < 0 or cooldown_ms < 1:
        return False, accepted_shots, "projectile-domain"
    if accepted_shots > requested_shots or accepted_shots > live_cap:
        return False, accepted_shots, "fire-budget"
    if lifetime_ms <= cooldown_ms:
        return False, lifetime_ms, "lifetime-policy"
    if leaked_projectiles > 0:
        return False, leaked_projectiles, "ownership-leak"
    assert accepted_shots <= live_cap
    return True, accepted_shots, "bounded-projectiles"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic pure-Python Asteroids decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected frame, input, seam, collision, cue, save, package, or release case, then state which native pygame-ce, SDL, display, controller, audio, filesystem, GPU, accessibility playtest, installer, performance, recovery, or publication claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.
